SLNO.notes: Deal announced Q1 2026, closing Q2-Q3 2026. Regulatory approvals pending.

FOLD.notes: Galafold Fabry $521.7M FY25 + Pombiliti/Opfolda Pompe $112.5M FY25 + DMX-200 FSGS US (Dimerix-licensed Apr 30 2025). Deal closed Apr 27 2026; FOLD ceased trading. Assets now under BMRN.

APLS.deal_structure: Section 251(h) Delaware two-step: cash tender offer launched Apr 14 2026 (20 business days, majority tender condition; ~14% locked via tender/support agreements). No shareholder vote.
APLS.consideration: $41.00/share cash upfront + non-transferable CVR up to $4.00/share (Syfovre milestones: $2 if reaches $1.5B annual sales 2027-2030, +$2 if reaches $2B 2027-2030; OR $4 if reaches $2B in 2031)
APLS.regulatory: HSR filed Apr 10 2026 (30-day waiting period expires May 11 2026) + customary foreign antitrust
APLS.financing: $3.6B Biogen cash + $2.0B new bank debt; no equity issuance; targeted paydown end-2027
APLS.notes: Apellis assets transferred to BIIB config: Syfovre GA $587M, Empaveli PNH $82M, Empaveli C3G $20M (FDA Jul 2025 sBLA ramp), APL-3007 siRNA C3 Ph2 combo. Deal accretive to BIIB non-GAAP EPS from 2027.
